description: Analyzer agent skill for workspace scanning and reporting

# Analyzer Agent Skill

## Skill: scan-workspace-and-report
- Scan the workspace structure
- Identify all projects/modules
- For each project, extract:
  - Purpose (business/technical)
  - Main files and entry points
  - Dependencies
  - Integration points
- Output a markdown summary report

---
# End of Analyzer Agent Skill
